title: I-81 to Close Overnight Between Exits 16A & 17
summary: The New York State Department of Transportation will close I-81 between exits 16A and 17 in Syracuse during overnight hours (6 p.m. to 6 a.m.) beginning November 15, 2023, to remove steel bridge beams for the I-481 southbound ramp bridge demolition as part of the I-81 Viaduct Project. Signed detours will direct traffic via I-481 North, Brighton Avenue, and Route 11; additional closures dependent on weather and work progress will be announced Friday.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Transportation

political_signal.description: I-81 Viaduct Project demolition represents major state infrastructure priority affecting city traffic patterns; Syracuse CIO should track project timeline, detour effectiveness, and potential smart traffic/real-time info opportunities.

processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown; byline reflects state agency (NYDOT) coordination
Date discrepancy: URL path shows 2024 but article dated 2023-11-16; content references November 15-16, 2023 events
No local City departments directly responsible; state-led project with city coordination role
Strong opportunity for CIO involvement: real-time traffic management, 511 system integration, mobile app detour notifications
